title: Senior SEO Specialist at Specsmakers South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Specsmakers South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Specsmakers South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Specsmakers South Asia Partners:
Specsmakers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers South Asia Partners!
